feat.name: Aura of Courage
feat.text: You stand strong in the face of danger and inspire your allies to do the same. Whenever you become frightened, reduce the condition value by 1 (to a minimum of 0). At the end of your turn, each ally in your champion's aura reduces its frightened value by 1.

traits.name: Champion
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the champion class.
